entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,618Chapters: 15/16Kudos: 35

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,695Chapters: 12/75Kudos: 16

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 142,488Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 307

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Obsessed
entry.summary:
Author: Almaie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 346Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Stiles Stilinski died in an accident involving his boyfriend, Derek Hale. Stiles is reborn and sent back 9 years. To save his future self he avoids Derek Hale and avoids his feelings for him. The problem is Stiles has loved Derek for a long time and has written about him in his diary. While destroying the diary, Derek discovers a few pages. Causing Derek to become curious about Stiles. Will he resist the love of the handsome man Derek and save his future self, or will he fall for the same man twice and risk his life?

entry.title: Packbound
entry.summary:
Author: Stillreadingfanfictbh

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,704Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 38

Summary: Stiles Stilinski never expected a single strange invitation to pull him into the Hale pack’s world, but suddenly he’s living in a house that hums, learning rules no one explains, and feeling things no human should. What starts as temporary refuge becomes a slow, unsettling sense of belonging as the land, the pack, and Derek Hale himself begin to pull him in. Between hunters, old grief, and a bond he was never meant to touch, Stiles has to decide whether he’s losing himself or finally finding where he fits.

entry.title: Load-Bearing Walls
entry.summary:
Author: PromptedScribe

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,592Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: Derek is tearing down the Hale house. Rebuilding on the foundation. He doesn't ask for help. Stiles shows up anyway — with a spreadsheet, a build schedule, and a group chat called "HGTV: Hell Edition." Within six months, Stiles has nested so deeply into the territory that his scent is in the walls, he's wearing Derek's hoodies like they're his, and every wolf in the pack has quietly rearranged their life around him. He has no idea what he's doing. He thinks he's just the annoying human who does research. Then the Alpha Council shows up, and an ancient Alpha names the thing everyone — except Stiles — has known for over a year. Or: two people build a home together without admitting they're building it for each other. It starts with the house.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Latibule
entry.summary:
Author: Deanslefttoe

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,306Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 132

Summary: **new chapter coming soon** Latibule: (noun.) A hiding place; a place or person of safety and comfort Stiles is at college, in his second year of study, trying to navigate being a broke student, being away from his home town, and being kicked out of his pack.Stiles is prepared, feeling less off balance than his previous year at college, he's excited, even, ready to get through as much as possible. And, he is almost over the guilt and shame and heartbreak that came with the whole getting kicked out of his pack thing. Yes, he still has a crush on Derek, but he has had a crush on Derek since he was 16, and now at 21, he's pretty sure he can manage.What happens when Stiles's new Folklore & Anthropology professor turns out to be Derek Hale, the one who kicked him from the pack 2 years earlier? What happens when Stiles is so utterly convinced that Derek hates him that he can't read between the lines of what the werewolf is trying to tell him?Read to find out ;)

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,139Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. -------------------------------------------------------------- This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.

entry.title: Am I Not Attractive To Gay Guys?
entry.summary:
Author: AnachronisticFruit

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,777Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Ever since Danny came out in seventh grade, Stiles was constantly asking him if he found Stiles attractive. Well, no, not exactly, he would ask "am I attractive to gay gays?" or "do gay guys find me attractive?". Danny always just ignored him. He wasn't just there to be some straight guy's ego boost. Even though he was kinda cute. He was very much a twink, and Danny knew plenty of gay guys who would definitely be attracted to Stiles. And, yeah, sure, gay guys aren't a monolith, yada yada, but an hour down at The Jungle and Stiles would find just how attractive gay guys found him.

entry.title: Everything We Never Said
entry.summary:
Author: AimeeDaraLyon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,089Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: After years of near-misses, half-spoken thoughts, and feelings carefully avoided in favor of “keeping things normal,” Stiles and Derek finally stop pretending they don’t know what’s been obvious to everyone else in the pack for a very long time.Scott calls it out. Lydia gets tired of it. And Stiles and Derek… finally start telling the truth.(It only takes ten years.)

entry.summary:

entry.title: A Kiss with no End ? ( Os)
entry.summary:
Author: Bloodlypup32

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,791Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 18

Summary: I recommend read the notes. And here is a small look in on what could happen He caged Stiles in slowly and came closer till there Bodys almost touched. With every breath there both took, the other one could feel it on there face like a ghost. „Im going to do something now and i want you to push me away if it is to much and even punch me if i read the lines wrong,but i need to do this now to just…know“He breathed against my lips and switched with his eyes up and down. Or this The hand on the waist slowly rubbed soothing up and down, a feather light touch. „Morning baby, sleept good?“Peter brushed softly over Stiles nose, with his index finger. a soft yawn could be heard, soft brown eyes began to open. Peter looked at him and softly moved more up, he leaned in and gave a slow kiss on the lips. Nothing special just a good morning kiss that was filled with love and softness, and even with so much love that it could have spilled. He leaned in and let himself bath in the morning light, in the touches and the kiss. A hand came slowly up to Peter‘s face to touch him slightly on the cheek. „maybe i can make the morning even better“ Stiles smirked. (Writer in training)

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 1,541

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

entry.title: The Ghost of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: pixieblade

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,664Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Mieczysław Stilinski stepped out of the transport ship with the air of someone who had seen everything and could have cared less about most of it. He was here to observe. To learn how the rest of the Galactic Syndicate Members trained their soldiers, advisors, and researchers. His father had been specific in his instructions: keep your eyes and ears open and your mouth shut. Keep the darkness contained and no matter what, never let them know what you are.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,059Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 41

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: Pup cups & curly fries
entry.summary:
Author: punk2

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,032Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 74

Summary: “Stiles…” “Yeah, buddy?” he says through a mouthful.There’s a crinkle followed by silence, and he raises his head to glance over at where Derek is standing, still not far from the door. The man pulls a little plastic container close to his nose and hesitantly sniffs it. Stiles almost wishes he’d thought to film this glorious moment, but he actually values his life. Somewhat. Not enough to not do this, but enough to not film it.“Is this-... Why is there whipped cream in here?” To be fair, Stiles did also get him a double whatever-kind-of burger, with bacon! So he can’t be too mad, can he? Stiles really hopes not, because he can’t help snorting so hard he almost chokes on a fry. Finally, he clears his throat and says, “It’s a pup cup!”Silence. “Because… Because you’re uh…” “I highly suggest you do not finish that sentence. Not if you value your arms”. “M-my arms?”“Because I will break them”. “Yep. Uh-huh, yeah no, that’s… yep. You got it. Shutting up!” ---In which everything is basically just crack, because it's Stiles. And I mean... Yeah, that should tell you enough.

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: The_Lady_Grey

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,869Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 140

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.
